verses.geez:
ወጸውዖሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ስማዕ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ኵነኔ ፡ ወፍትሐ ፡ ዘአነ ፡
                  እነግረ[ክሙ] ፡ ዮም ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዘኒክሙ ፡ በዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወተመሀሩ ፡ ገቢሮቶ ፡ ወዐቂቦቶ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses called all Israel, and said to them, Hear, Israel, the ordinances and judgments, all that I speak in your ears this day, and ye shall learn them, and observe to do them.
translations.kjv: And Moses called all Israel, and said unto them, Hear, O Israel, the statutes and judgments which I speak in your ears this day, that ye may learn them, and keep, and do them.

verses.geez: እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ አቀመ ፡ ኪዳኖ ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ በኮሬብ ።

translations.lxx: The Lord your God made a covenant with you in Choreb.
translations.kjv: The LORD our God made a covenant with us in Horeb.

verses.geez:
አኮ ፡ ለአበዊክሙ ፡ ዘአቀመ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ኪዳነ ፡ አላ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ሀለውክሙ ፡ ዝየ ፡ ዮም ፡ ኵልክሙ
                  ፡ ሕያዋን ።

translations.lxx: The Lord did not make this covenant with your fathers, but with you: ye are all here alive this day.
translations.kjv: The LORD made not this covenant with our fathers, but with us, even us, who are all of us here alive this day.

verses.geez: ገጸ ፡ በገጽ ፡ ተናገረክሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በደብር ፡ በማእከለ ፡ እሳት ።

translations.lxx: The Lord spoke to you face to face in the mountain out of the midst of the fire.
translations.kjv: The LORD talked with you face to face in the mount out of the midst of the fire,

verses.geez:
ወአንሰ ፡ [እቀውም ፡ ማእከለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወ]ማእከሌክሙ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ከመ ፡ እንግርክሙ ፡ ቃሎ ፡
                  ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ እስመ ፡ ፈራህክሙ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጸ ፡ እሳት ፡ ወኢዐረግሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብር ።

translations.lxx: And I stood between the Lord and you at that time to report to you the words of the Lord, (because ye were afraid before the fire, and ye went not up to the mountain,) saying,
translations.kjv: (I stood between the LORD and you at that time, to shew you the word of the LORD: for ye were afraid by reason of the fire, and went not up into the mount;) saying,

verses.geez: ወይቤ ፡ አነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ ዘአውፃእኩከ ፡ አምነ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ቅኔት ።

translations.lxx: I am the Lord thy God, who brought thee out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage.
translations.kjv: I am the LORD thy God, which brought thee out of the land of Egypt, from the house of bondage.

verses.geez: ወኢይኩንከ ፡ ባዕድ ፡ አማልክት ፡ እንበሌየ ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt have no other gods before my face.
translations.kjv: Thou shalt have none other gods before me.

verses.geez:
ወኢትግበር ፡ ለከ ፡ አምላከ ፡ ዘግልፎ ፡ ወኢበኵሉ ፡ አምሳለ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ በላዕሉ ፡ ወኢበኵሉ ፡ ዘ[ውስተ] ፡
                  ምድር ፡ በታሕቱ ፡ ወኢበኵሉ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ማይ ፡ መትሕተ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt not make to thyself an image, nor likeness of any thing, whatever things are in the heaven above, and whatever are in the earth beneath, and whatever are in the waters under the earth.
translations.kjv: Thou shalt not make thee any graven image, or any likeness of any thing that is in heaven above, or that is in the earth beneath, or that is in the waters beneath the earth:

verses.geez:
ወኢትስግድ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ወኢታምልኮሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ አምላክ ፡ ቀናኢ ፡ ዘያትፈደይ ፡ ኀጣይአ
                  ፡ ወላዲ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ውሉድ ፡ እስከ ፡ ሣልስት ፡ ወራብዕት ፡ ትውልድ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ይጸልኡኒ ፤

translations.lxx: Thou shalt not bow down to them, nor shalt thou serve them; for I am the Lord thy God, a jealous God, visiting the sins of the fathers upon the children to the third and fourth generation to them that hate me,
translations.kjv: Thou shalt not bow down thyself unto them, nor serve them: for I the LORD thy God am a jealous God, visiting the iniquity of the fathers upon the children unto the third and fourth generation of them that hate me,

verses.geez: ወእገብር ፡ ምሕረተ ፡ እስከ ፡ እልፍ ፡ ትውልድ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ያፈቅሩኒ ፡ ወለእለ ፡ የዐቅቡ ፡ ትእዛዝየ ።

translations.lxx: and doing mercifully to thousands of them that love me, and that keep my commandments.
translations.kjv: And shewing mercy unto thousands of them that love me and keep my commandments.

verses.geez:
ኢትምሐል ፡ በስመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ በሐሰት ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢያነጽሖ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለዛ ፡ ይምሕል ፡ በስሙ
                  ፡ በሐሰት ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt not take the name of the Lord thy God in vain, for the Lord thy God will certainly not acquit him that takes his name in vain.
translations.kjv: Thou shalt not take the name of the LORD thy God in vain: for the LORD will not hold him guiltless that taketh his name in vain.

verses.geez: ወዕቀብ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ሰንበት ፡ ከመ ፡ ትቀድሳ ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዘከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ።

translations.lxx: Keep the sabbath day to sanctify it, as the Lord thy God commanded thee.
translations.kjv: Keep the sabbath day to sanctify it, as the LORD thy God hath commanded thee.

verses.geez: ሰዱሰ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ትገብር ፡ ግብረ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ግብረከ ።

translations.lxx: Six days thou shalt work, and thou shalt do all thy works;
translations.kjv: Six days thou shalt labour, and do all thy work:

verses.geez:
ወበሳብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ሰንበቱ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ ወኢትግበር ፡ ባቲ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ግብረከ ፡ ወኢወልድከ ፡
                  ወኢወለትከ ፡ ወኢገብርከ ፡ ወኢአመትከ ፡ ወኢላህምከ ፡ ወኢአድግከ ፡ ወኢኵሉ ፡ እንስሳከ ፡ ወኢግዩር ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ዴዴከ ፡
                  ከመ ፡ ያዕርፍ ፡ ገብርከ ፡ ወአመትከ ፡ ከማከ ።

translations.lxx: but on the seventh day is the sabbath of the Lord thy God: thou shalt do in it no work, thou, and thy son, and thy daughter, thy man-servant, and thy maid-servant, thine ox, and thine ass, and all thy cattle, and the stranger that sojourns in the midst of thee; that thy man-servant may rest, and thy maid, and thine ox, as well as thou.
translations.kjv: But the seventh day is the sabbath of the LORD thy God: in it thou shalt not do any work, thou, nor thy son, nor thy daughter, nor thy manservant, nor thy maidservant, nor thine ox, nor thine ass, nor any of thy cattle, nor thy stranger that is within thy gates; that thy manservant and thy maidservant may rest as well as thou.

verses.geez:
ወተዘከር ፡ ከመ ፡ ገብር ፡ አንተ ፡ በምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወአውፅአከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ እምህየ ፡ በእድ ፡
                  ጽንዕት ፡ ወበመዝራዕት ፡ ልዑል ፡ ወበበይነ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ አዘዘከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትዕቀባ ፡ ለዕለተ ፡
                  ሰንበት ፡ ወትቀድሳ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt remember that thou wast a slave in the land of Egypt, and the Lord thy God brought thee out thence with a mighty hand, and a high arm: therefore the Lord appointed thee to keep the sabbath day and to sanctify it.
translations.kjv: And remember that thou wast a servant in the land of Egypt, and that the LORD thy God brought thee out thence through a mighty hand and by a stretched out arm: therefore the LORD thy God commanded thee to keep the sabbath day.

verses.geez:
አክብር ፡ አባከ ፡ ወእመከ ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዘከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ ከመ ፡ ሠናይት ፡ ትኩን ፡ ላዕሌከ ፡
                  ወይኑኅ ፡ መዋዕሊከ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ወሀበከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ።

translations.lxx: Honour thy father and thy mother, as the Lord thy God commanded thee; that it may be well with thee, and that thou mayest live long upon the land, which the Lord thy God gives thee.
translations.kjv: Honour thy father and thy mother, as the LORD thy God hath commanded thee; that thy days may be prolonged, and that it may go well with thee, in the land which the LORD thy God giveth thee.

verses.geez:
ኢትሑር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ብእሲ ፤ ወኢትቅትል ፡ ነፍሰ ፤ ወኢትስርቅ ፤ ወኢትኩን ፡ ስምዐ ፡ በሐሰት ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ቢጽከ
                  ፡ ኢተሐሱ ፡ ስምዐ ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt not commit murder.
translations.kjv: Thou shalt not kill.

verses.geez:
ወኢትፍቶ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ካልእከ ፡ ወኢትፍቶ ፡ ቤቶ ፡ ለካልእከ ፡ ወኢገራህቶ ፡ ወኢገብሮ ፡ ወኢአመቶ ፡ ወኢላህሞ ፡
                  ወኢአድጎ ፡ ወኢእምኵሉ ፡ እንስሳሁ ፡ ወኢእምኵሉ ፡ ዘቦቱ ፡ ካልእከ ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt not commit adultery.
translations.kjv: Neither shalt thou commit adultery.

verses.geez:
ዝንቱ ፡ ነገር ፡ ዘነገረ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ተዓይኒክሙ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ደብር ፡ በማእከለ ፡ እሳት ፡ ወጽልመት ፡
                  ወዐውሎ ፡ ወጣቃ ፡ ወቃል ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ ወኢደገመ ፡ እንከ ፡ ወጸሐፎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ጽላት ፡ ዘእብን ፡ ወወሀበኒ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt not steal.
translations.kjv: Neither shalt thou steal.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ሰማዕ[ክሙ] ፡ ውእተ ፡ ቃለ ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ እሳት ፡ ወደብሩሂ ፡ ይነድድ ፡ በእሳት ፡ ወመጻእክሙ
                  ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ ኵልክሙ ፡ መላእክተ ፡ ነገድክሙ ፡ ወአእሩጊክሙ ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt not bear false witness against thy neighbour.
translations.kjv: Neither shalt thou bear false witness against thy neighbour.

verses.geez:
ወትቤሉኒ ፡ ናሁ ፡ አርአየነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክነ ፡ ስብሐቲሁ ፡ ወቃሎሂ ፡ ሰማዕነ ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ እሳት ፡
                  ወዮም ፡ አእመርነ ፡ በዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትናገር ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ምስለ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ወየሐዩ ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt not covet thy neighbour's wife; thou shalt not covet thy neighbour's house, nor his field, nor his man-servant, nor his maid, nor his ox, nor his ass, nor any beast of his, nor any thing that is thy neighbour's.
translations.kjv: Neither shalt thou desire thy neighbour’s wife, neither shalt thou covet thy neighbour’s house, his field, or his manservant, or his maidservant, his ox, or his ass, or any thing that is thy neighbour’s.

verses.geez:
ወይእዜኒ ፡ ኢንሙት ፡ ወኢታጥፍአነ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ እሳት ፡ ዐባይ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ደገምነ ፡ ንሕነ ፡ ሰሚዖተ ፡ ቃሎ ፡
                  ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክነ ፡ ዓዲ ፡ ንመውት ፡ እንከ ።

translations.lxx: These words the Lord spoke to all the assembly of you in the mountain out of the midst of the fire—there was darkness, blackness, storm, a loud voice—and he added no more, and he wrote them on two tables of stone, and he gave them to me.
translations.kjv: These words the LORD spake unto all your assembly in the mount out of the midst of the fire, of the cloud, and of the thick darkness, with a great voice: and he added no more. And he wrote them in two tables of stone, and delivered them unto me.

verses.geez:
ወመኑ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ዘሥጋ ፡ ዘይሰምዕ ፡ ቃሎ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘሕያው ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይትናገር ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ እሳት
                  ፡ ካማነ ፡ ወየሐዩ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass when ye heard the voice out of the midst of the fire, for the mountain burned with fire, that ye came to me, even all the heads of your tribes, and your elders:
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when ye heard the voice out of the midst of the darkness, (for the mountain did burn with fire,) that ye came near unto me, even all the heads of your tribes, and your elders;

verses.geez:
ሑር ፡ አንተ ፡ ወስማዕ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዛይብል ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክነ ፡ ወንግረነ ፡ አንተ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘይቤለከ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክነ ፡ [ወንሰምዕ ፡ ወንገብር ።]

translations.lxx: and ye said, Behold, the Lord our God has shewn us his glory, and we have heard his voice out of the midst of the fire: this day we have seen that God shall speak to man, and he shall live.
translations.kjv: And ye said, Behold, the LORD our God hath shewed us his glory and his greatness, and we have heard his voice out of the midst of the fire: we have seen this day that God doth talk with man, and he liveth.

verses.geez:
ወሰምዐ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ቃለ ፡ ነገርክሙ ፡ ዘነበብክሙ ፡ ዘትቤሉኒ ፡ ወይቤለኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ሰማዕኩ ፡ ቃሎሙ ፡
                  ዘይቤሉ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘይቤሉከ ፡ ወርቱዕ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘይቤሉ ።

translations.lxx: And now let us not die, for this great fire will consume us, if we shall hear the voice of the Lord our God any more, and we shall die.
translations.kjv: Now therefore why should we die? for this great fire will consume us: if we hear the voice of the LORD our God any more, then we shall die.

verses.geez:
መኑ ፡ እምወሀቦሙ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ይኩን ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይፍርሁኒ ፡ ወይዕቀቡ ፡ ትእዛዝየ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ መዋዕሊሆሙ ፡
                  ከመ ፡ ሠናይት ፡ ትኩኖሙ ፡ ወለውሉዶሙ ፡ እስከ ፡ ለዓለም ።

translations.lxx: For what flesh is there which has heard the voice of the living God, speaking out of the midst of the fire, as we have heard, and shall live?
translations.kjv: For who is there of all flesh, that hath heard the voice of the living God speaking out of the midst of the fire, as we have, and lived?

verses.geez: ሑር ፡ ወበሎሙ ፡ እትውአ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አብያቲክሙአ ።

translations.lxx: Do thou draw near, and hear all that the Lord our God shall say, and thou shalt speak to us all things whatsoever the Lord our God shall speak to thee, and we will hear, and do.
translations.kjv: Go thou near, and hear all that the LORD our God shall say: and speak thou unto us all that the LORD our God shall speak unto thee; and we will hear it, and do it.

verses.geez:
ወአንተሰ ፡ ቁም ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ እንግርከ ፡ ትእዛዝየ ፡ ወኵነኔየ ፡ ወፍትሕየ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘትሜህሮሙ ፡ ወይግበሩ ፡ ከማሁ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ አነ ፡ እሁቦሙ ፡ ርስቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord heard the voice of your words as ye spoke to me; and the Lord said to me, I have heard the voice of the words of this people, even all things that they have said to thee. They have well said all that they have spoken.
translations.kjv: And the LORD heard the voice of your words, when ye spake unto me; and the LORD said unto me, I have heard the voice of the words of this people, which they have spoken unto thee: they have well said all that they have spoken.

verses.geez: ወዕቀቡ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትግበሩ ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዘኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ ወኢትትገሐሥ ፡ ኢለየማን ፡ ወኢለፀጋም ፤

translations.lxx: O that there were such a heart in them, that they should fear me and keep my commands always, that it might be well with them and with their sons for ever.
translations.kjv: O that there were such an heart in them, that they would fear me, and keep all my commandments always, that it might be well with them, and with their children for ever!

verses.geez:
እምነ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ፍኖት ፡ እንተ ፡ አዘዘከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትሑር ፡ ባቲ ፡ ወከመ ፡ ሠናይት ፡
                  ትኩንክሙ ፡ ወከመ ፡ ታዕርፉ ፡ ወይኑኅ ፡ መዋዕሊክሙ ፡ ውስቴ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ትትዋረሱ ።

translations.lxx: Go, say to them, Return ye to your houses;
translations.kjv: Go say to them, Get you into your tents again.
